_comment: TEMPLATE (FRAMEWORK.md §C11.5). Hooks = deterministic automation at fixed lifecycle events, regardless of what the model decides. Merge this 'hooks' block into .claude/settings.json (project, shared) or ~/.claude/settings.json (personal). Events incl. SessionStart/SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SubagentStop, PreCompact. 'matcher' filters by tool name (e.g. 'Write|Edit'); handler 'type' may be command|http|mcp_tool. Replace the command paths and delete this _comment key.
